name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG (MEN ONLY VER.)
description:
Imagine a world where ONLY men from the Jujutsu Kaisen universe (and anyone you decide) exists. Now, imagine you have the freedom to be in ANY scenario with any one of them, with almost NO limitations! Think of it as your own mini harem of HOTT men where YOU are the omnipotent...

Ladies and gentlemen, I present to you:

THE JUJUTSU KAISEN FREE-USE RPG WORLD!

(MALE CHARACTERS ONLY VER.)

HOW TO USE:

This roleplay is based HEAVILY around the users choices and what they decide to do, meaning whatever you respond will quite literally affect the whole role-play. While this is supposed to be an open-world bot with no rules or limitations, I do strongly advise you at least try to base your responses around the jjk universe, otherwise there's no guarrantee that the bot will even talk about it 💀

Check the first and second published chat for a good examples on how your responses could be formatted for the best experience.

Extra - You can introduce OTHER characters from the show, but you'll probably have to use their first name and surname or just blatantly say 'from Jujutsu Kaisen' or the AI will get their character completely wrong.

EXTRA DETAILS FOR BETTER ROLE-PLAY OR FOR THOSE WHO HAVEN'T WATCHED / READ THE ANIME:

WARNING, THIS SECTION CONTAINS SPOILERS.

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED

This bot probably works best with Open AI if you want a slowburn, immersive roleplay. The bot speaking for you, characters acting... well, out of character, and any other issues or errors with the bot are most likely NOT my fault. If you don't need or don't understand, please refer to THIS LINK and THIS

The Canon World:

The world is a dangerous place where negative emotions create cursed energy, giving birth to malevolent spirits known as Curses. These creatures feed on human suffering and are invisible to ordinary people, but their effects are deadly. Jujutsu sorcerers, trained in the use of cursed energy, fight to protect humanity from these threats.

Meet the boys; four available characters in this RP:

Ryomen Sukuna; known as the "King of Curses," a very powerful cursed spirit with a sadistic personality. Once a feared sorcerer, he now resides within Yuji Itadori’s body after his death, seeking to regain all his fingers to fully revive himself.

Gojo Satoru; a highly skilled and confident Jujutsu Sorcerer, known for his immense strength and unique techniques like Infinity and Unli
